title: pariti tiliifolium
intro: Pariti tiliifolium, also known as the butterfly pea, is a perennial plant species in the genus Clitoria, belonging to the family Fabaceae. The plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly its flowers and leaves, which contain flavonoids, alkaloids, and glycosides that have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Pariti tiliifolium include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cognitive function, and act as an antioxidant. Pariti tiliifolium is commonly used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and capsules, and is also used as a natural food coloring due to its vibrant blue color.
